title: Hybred's Tools
description: It is a pack that changes the color and shape of tools to be more realistic; diamonds are now a whitish blue instead of a greenish blue, shapes are slightly tweaked to be more life like.
body: It is a pack that changes the color and shape of tools to be more realistic; diamonds are now a whitish blue instead of a greenish blue, shapes are slightly tweaked to be more life like. This goes well with any vanilla styled 32x packs like faithful, depixel, etc.
